name: Pancit Canton (Sauteed Egg Noodles)
recipeIngredient: Shrimps, 1 cup, shelled and thinly sliced
Carrots, 2 cups, sliced into thin strips (2-inch)
Cabbage, ½ of a whole, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep non-stick pan over medium heat, sauté garlic in oil until lightly browned.
2. Add onion, pork, prawns, carrots, celery, cabbage, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Stir while cooking.
3. Cook for 5-8 minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender.
4. Remove the vegetable and meat mixture. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, bring chicken stock to a boil with 1 tablespoon soy sauce and a pinch of salt.
6. Gently add the egg noodles into boiling liquid, stirring carefully until absorbed and noodles are softer.
7. Mix in half of the vegetable mixture, ensuring not to mash the noodles.
8. When noodles are cooked, transfer to a serving platter and top with the remaining vegetable mixture.
9. Serve with lemon slices on the side.
Serves 6 to 8.
